Full Stack Developer MERN Stack Developer AI Enthusiast Problem-Solving Developer

I am a Final Year Computer Science student passionate about Full Stack Development and Artificial Intelligence. I enjoy transforming ideas into modern, scalable, and user-friendly web applications. Driven by a problem-solving mindset, I aim to build digital products that create meaningful impact and simplify everyday experiences.

View projects Download resume

about

Compiling four years into one stack.

I'm a final-year B.E. Computer Science and Engineering student at Unnamalai Institute of Technology, Anna University, with an 8.7 CGPA. I'm passionate about Full Stack Development and Artificial Intelligence, building scalable, user-friendly web applications using the MERN stack.

My focus is on solving real-world problems through clean code, modern development practices, and meaningful AI integration. I've strengthened my technical foundation through AWS Academy, Infosys Springboard, and hands-on project development.

Beyond coding, I serve as a Student Coordinator for our National Level Technical Symposium, where I've developed leadership, teamwork, and event management skills that complement my technical expertise.

the stack

Four layers, one rendered experience.

Every project below is built the same way the stack itself is structured — data at the bottom, logic in the middle, interface on top.

Data layer

MongoDB

Schema design, document modelling, and querying for chat, booking, and resume-data stores.

Server layer

Node & Express

REST APIs, JWT authentication, and Socket.IO for low-latency, bidirectional communication.

Interface layer

React & Next.js

Responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap, built mobile-first and component-driven.

Intelligence layer

Groq API & AI

AI-driven resume analysis and interview coaching, applied where it adds real value.

MERNstack
Database
Backend
Frontend

orbit stack

The core tools orbit around the product.

Frontend, backend, and data layers revolve around the same experience so every app feels coherent from the first click to the final API response.

React Node MongoDB Next.js

tech knows

Tiny cards, bold stack.

I like keeping the core stack visual and approachable — a handful of tools that work well together, each with a little motion and personality.

projects

Built end to end, not just demoed.

AI Resume Analyzer & Interview Coach

Live demo Ai-Mock-Interview-With-Resume-Analyzer

An AI-powered platform that reads a resume and returns personalized, Groq-generated improvement suggestions, then generates interview questions with real-time feedback — built to make resume polish and interview prep less of a guessing game for job seekers.

Next.js React.js Node.js Express.js MongoDB Groq API

Real-Time Communication Platform

Live demo chatapp

A real-time chat application with secure user authentication and instant messaging, powered by Socket.IO for low-latency, bidirectional communication between users.

React.js Node.js Express.js MongoDB Socket.IO

Hospital Booking System — Naan Mudhalvan Hackathon

NM-Hackathon

A hospital appointment booking system with scheduling and patient management modules, built during the Naan Mudhalvan Hackathon to streamline appointment handling for staff and patients.

React.js Node.js Express.js MongoDB

Pokémon Information Web Application

Live demo Portalam Internship, 2025

Built during a Web Development internship: a responsive React.js UI integrating the PokéAPI for dynamic data rendering, sharpening frontend and third-party API integration skills.

React.js PokéAPI
